zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Maria Schenckelberg於1685年12月出生時，她的父親Peter Schenckelberg41歲，母親Elisabeth11682歲。她於1704年11月27日與Johann Daniel Runckel在海因里希_海普洛文次維德雷斯多福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1720年6月15日在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 維德梅爾斯巴賀享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Maria Schenckelberg于1685年12月出生时，她的父亲Peter Schenckelberg41岁，母亲Elisabeth11682岁。她于1704年11月27日与Johann Daniel Runckel在海因里希_海普洛文次維德雷斯多福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1720年6月15日在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 維德梅爾斯巴賀享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Schenckelberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so called in the Westerwald area.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

nameMeanings.name: Maria
meanings: A name derived from Mapia, one of the Greek forms of Miriam. Maria is found as a male name as well as a female name. Viscount Montague, of Cowdray, Sussex, who succeeded to the title as second viscount, was christened Anthony Maria Browne. In Camden's Remains (p. 44), referred to in Delicie Literarise, occurs Thomas Maria Wingfield; and there was also a Sir Edward Maria Wingfield. The name appears to have been adopted in the latter family from Mary, daughter of Henry VIII. Compare Notes and Queries 5th S. ii. 73, 316, 478. Marie is frequently found as a male name in France and in other parts of the Continent.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Maria Schenckelberg was born in December 1685, her father, Peter Schenckelberg, was 41 and her mother, Elisabeth, was 11682. She married Johann Daniel Runckel on 27 November 1704, in Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rhineland, Prussia. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 15 June 1720, in Melsbach, Neuwied, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Maria Schenckelberg est née en décembre 1685, son père, Peter Schenckelberg, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth, avait 11682 ans. Elle a épousé Johann Daniel Runckel le 27 novembre 1704, à Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rhénanie, Prusse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 juin 1720, à Melsbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Maria Schenckelberg im Dezember 1685 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter Schenckelberg 41 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth 11682. Sie hat am 27. November 1704 in Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen Johann Daniel Runckel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Juni 1720 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Melsbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Maria Schenckelberg è nata il nel dicembre 1685, sua padre, Peter Schenckelberg, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth, aveva 11682 anni. Lei sposato Johann Daniel Runckel il 27 novembre 1704, nel Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 15 giugno 1720, nel Melsbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Schenckelbergが1685年12月に生まれた時，父Peter Schenckelbergは41歳，母Elisabethは11682歳であった。1704年11月27日にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズネウウィエドレングスドルフでJohann Daniel Runckelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1720年6月15日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス ネウウィエドメルスバチで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Schenckelberg(이)가 1685년 12월에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Schenckelberg(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth(은)는 11682세였다. 그녀는 1704년 11월 27일 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 니우위드 렌그즈도르프에서 Johann Daniel Runckel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1720년 6월 15일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 니우위드 멜스바치에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Dezember 1685–15 Jun 1720: 1685 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сар–1720 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 15

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Maria Schenckelberg nasceu em dezembro de 1685, seu pai, Peter Schenckelberg, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth, tinha 11682 anos. Ela casou-se com Johann Daniel Runckel em 27 de novembro de 1704, em Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de junho de 1720, em Melsbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Maria Schenckelberg родилась декабрь 1685 г., её отцу по имени Peter Schenckelberg было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth, 11682. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johann Daniel Runckel 27 ноября 1704 г. в местности ренгсдорф, неувиед, раинпровинз, Пруссия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 15 июня 1720 г. в местности мелсбач, ландкрис неувиед, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Maria Schenckelberg nació en diciembre de 1685, su papá, Peter Schenckelberg, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Elisabeth, tenía 11682 años. Se casó con Johann Daniel Runckel el 27 de noviembre de 1704, en Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 15 de junio de 1720, en Melsbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 34 años.
